abstract: Guide for choosing between Tigris-native SDKs and AWS S3-compatible SDKs. Covers the Tigris TypeScript SDK (@tigrisdata/storage), Go SDK (storage-go), Python boto3 extension (tigris-boto3-ext), and CLI (tigris/t3) as preferred options. Documents when AWS SDKs (aws-sdk-s3, aws-sdk-php) are required (Ruby, PHP) and how to configure them with the Tigris endpoint.
